old_value: {"id":"broadside-goj2.5","title":"Media attachments silently dropped in delivery and outbox","description":"Both the delivery worker (delivery.rs:192-210) and the outbox endpoint (server.rs:461-478) build ActivityPub Create/Note JSON without an 'attachment' field. The post_media table is populated by webhook, feed, and CLI media processing, but the data is never read when constructing outbound activities. media::attachments_for_post() exists but is never called. Result: followers never see images attached to posts. Every post with media is delivered as text-only.","status":"open","priority":0,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"mark@reviewcommit.com","created_at":"2026-07-18T17:28:54.945469529Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-18T17:28:54.945469529Z","labels":["correctness","review"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"broadside-goj2.5","depends_on_id":"broadside-goj2","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-07-18T17:28:54.970434598Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}

new_value: Media attachments now included in delivery and outbox via attachments_for_post
